title: [release-1.16] overlay: fix umount
body:
/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

fix unmounting overlay when running as rootless.

#### How to verify it

`mkdir /tmp/foo && podman run --rm -v /tmp/foo:/tmp/foo:O fedora true` works

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:


#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


```release-note
NONE
```

We're a little late in the game, so I'm of the opinion that we document it's broken but make sure it's fixed and tested for the next release

> Is this a cherry pick from master?

it is still a draft as it is still based on commits that are not merged yet.  I'll move it to Ready once the other PR is merged
